name: Noisemaker Snare
description:
When a creature enters this snare's square, it triggers an extremely loud clockwork device, which explodes with a bang that can be heard from 200 feet away and deals ] damage. The creature must attempt a save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is for 1 round.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage and is for 1 minute.
